title: CTM360 ThreatCover
description: The OpenCTI CTM360 ThreatCover connector imports curated threat intelligence from the CTM360 ThreatCover module into OpenCTI. ThreatCover exposes its indicators and observables through a TAXII 2.1 collection; using the same TAXII handling as the generic OpenCTI TAXII2 connector (server discovery with token, API-key or basic authentication), it polls the configured collection on a schedule (incrementally, via the TAXII added_after filter and connector state), imports the returned STIX 2.1 objects, attributes them to a CTM360 ThreatCover author identity and applies a configurable TLP marking. It complements the existing CTM360 CyberBlindSpot, Cyna and HackerView connectors.
short_description: Imports CTM360 ThreatCover curated threat intelligence into OpenCTI via TAXII 2.1, with incremental polling, TLP markings, and CTM360 author attribution.
